version: 1
name: numbered-ingest
trigger:
  type: folder_watch
  path: ~/in
  glob: "*.png"
  ordinal_regex: 'img_(\d+)\.png'
  settle_seconds: 1
engine: headless
steps:
  - image.validate
  - file.rename_from_manifest: { manifest: ~/assets.csv }
  - image.export: { dest: ~/out, format: png }
on_failure: { retries: 0, then: mark_failed }
